name: Samsung Axis Bank Signature Credit Card
exclusions: online skill-based gaming above fee threshold
transactions excluded under Samsung Axis Bank Signature Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends greater than Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: 2,500 EDGE REWARD Points on completing 3 transactions within 30 days of card issuance
10% cashback on Samsung purchases including EMI transactions, capped at Rs 2,500 per month and Rs 10,000 per annum
10 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 100 with preferred partners bigbasket, Tata 1mg, Urban Company, Myntra and Zomato
5 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 100 on other domestic and international transactions
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year, subject to minimum eligible spend of Rs 50,000 in previous 3 months
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 500 per statement
Dining Delights offer of 15% off up to Rs 500 once per month at participating restaurants
Convert transactions of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI
Wednesday Delight offers as per Axis Bank programme terms

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
